chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 527 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.1387/204 (R/Surety) 29.03.2024 Mr. Waheed Ali Qazi, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application has been filed by applicant Munawar Ali seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Habibullah was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 08.08.2023 subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original Defence Savings Certificate of such amount. Thereafter, interim pre-arrest bail of accused was confirmed vide order dated 08.09.2023. Subsequently, the accused has been acquitted by the trial Court u/s 249-A CrPC vide order 12.02.2024, annexed with the application. Learned Additional Prosecutor General has extended no objection to grant of this application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
